description: CLAUDE.md behavioral guideline file for Claude Code. Covers five areas: thinking before coding, simplicity, surgical code changes, goal-driven execution with verifiable success criteria, and workflow mechanics including planning, subagents, and a self-improvement loop via tasks/lessons.md. Designed to reduce the most common LLM coding failure modes, overbuilding, silent assumptions, and incomplete verification, while keeping autonomous execution tight and traceable.
